answers: Pasta: Italian staple from durum wheat. Hundreds of shapes, each designed for specific sauces.
Exploring pasta is a delicious journey. Try different varieties and styles.
The world of pasta is rich and diverse. Start with the basics and expand your palate.
Pasta has a fascinating history and culture behind it. Learn and enjoy!

feelings.question: how to make pasta at home?
feelings.answer:
To make pasta at home, you will need the following ingredients and equipment:
- Durum wheat semolina (also known as farinata) or all-purpose flour
- Water
- Oil for frying
- Salt
- Pasta machine or rolling pin
1. Start with durum wheat semolina, which is a fine-grained wheat flour that has been ground into a fine powder. This will give your pasta a delicate texture and flavor. 2. Add water to the semolina until you reach a dough consistency of about 1/4 inch (0.6 cm) thick. You can also
